authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
U.S. Geological Survey (Geographic Names Information System)

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(170) — Yuba River, Middle Fork (Nevada and Sierra Cos.)
sources.quotedText: (170) Yuba River, Middle Fork (Nevada and Sierra Cos.) from Jackson Meadows Dam downstream to Milton Lake. See Milton Lake (b)(97).

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(97) — Milton Lake (Nevada and Sierra Cos.)
sources.quotedText: Milton Lake and Middle Fork Yuba River between Milton Lake and Jackson Meadows Dam (Nevada and Sierra Cos.). All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 263552, "Middle Yuba River", Stream, Sierra/Yuba/Nevada Cos., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":263552,"gaz_name":"Middle Yuba River","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":["Sierra","Yuba","Nevada"]} — this record covers only the upper reach of the stream between Jackson Meadows Dam and Milton Lake (Nevada/Sierra Cos.); coordinate set to the midpoint between the GNIS-confirmed coordinates of Jackson Meadows Reservoir (-120.55327, 39.50907) and Milton Lake (-120.5769, 39.5214, gaz_id 263659), the two named endpoints of this segment per CCR §7.50(b)(170)/(b)(97), replacing the file's previous guessed coordinate (-120.5600, 39.5100), which was off by roughly 730 m from that midpoint.

parameters.note: This segment (Jackson Meadows Dam downstream to Milton Lake) is cross-referenced by 14 CCR 7.50(b)(170) to share the regulation listed for Milton Lake at 7.50(b)(97): open all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year (regulation cross-referenced from Milton Lake entry)
regulations.verbatimText: Yuba River, Middle Fork (Nevada and Sierra Cos.) from Jackson Meadows Dam downstream to Milton Lake. See Milton Lake (b)(97). / Milton Lake and Middle Fork Yuba River between Milton Lake and Jackson Meadows Dam (Nevada and Sierra Cos.). All year.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used, per the cross-referenced Milton Lake entry at 7.50(b)(97).

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Zero trout may be retained; all trout caught must be released unharmed, per the cross-referenced Milton Lake entry at 7.50(b)(97).

regulations.humanSummary: Zero trout bag limit — catch and release only

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
